name: splunk-viz-packs
description: Build fully themed Splunk custom visualization apps — branded viz suites with shared design tokens, Canvas 2D rendering, and dual-format output (Classic AMD .tar.gz or Extension API ESM .spl). Takes brand context (palette, fonts, tone) and produces installable Splunk apps with multiple custom vizs sharing one design system. Includes aesthetic scoring (score_design.js), 50+ validation checks (B1-B23, D1-D11, E1-E5, F1-F12), animation boilerplates, multi-channel archetype, and threshold RAG template. Pairs with splunk-dashboard-studio plugin for dashboard JSON.
